rule_hits.summary: The references section lists academic papers and resources cited throughout the paper, providing background and context for the research presented.
This section describes the MEDUSA framework, including its key components (MEDUSA heads and tree attention), training strategies (MEDUSA-1 and MEDUSA-2), and extensions like sel...
The discussion summarizes the effectiveness of MEDUSA in accelerating LLM inference, emphasizing its simplicity, parameter efficiency, and ease of integration into existing syst...
Acknowledgements thank contributors for insights on LLM serving, discussions, and introductions to relevant concepts.
